rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical reworded versions: same strengths (broad experience, communication/mentorship, CI/CD and modern practices), same three concerns (insufficient/outdated C++ on Windows, no Capital Markets/Fixed Income domain expertise, weak SQL Server/Oracle evidence). The 1-point score difference (2 vs 3) actually slightly favors the variant and falls within ordinary run-to-run noise. No reasoning keys off the candidate's name, nationality, gender, or any demographic signal.
